name: devflow
description: Autonomous development system and AI gateway tools for Claude Code

plugins.name: devflow
plugins.description: Autonomous development system that turns ideas into shipped code. Handles project planning, task breakdown, parallel execution, verification, and progress tracking — so you describe what to build and DevFlow builds it.

plugins.name: aosentry-mcp
plugins.description: AI media and gateway management tools. Generate images, analyze visuals, convert text to speech, transcribe audio, and manage API keys, spend tracking, guardrails, and model routing through your AOSentry instance.
